purpose: Registered reference sources for instrument-profile enrichment and universe classification.

tushare_hk_basic.notes: Use as listing_date/basic HK security metadata enrichment. Do not treat as security-type proof by default.

hkex_reit_manual_seed.notes: Curated REIT override seed maintained from official HKEX REIT market-data lists. Higher priority than secondary OpenD ETF classification.

hkex_southbound_manual_seed.notes: Time-bounded southbound eligibility seed. Always keep as_of_date.

opend_security_snapshot.notes: Current-security snapshot for listing-date backfill and secondary low-code non-equity classification. Do not promote to semantic proof by default.
